## [Note]

- dbbot v0.7.0 refreshes the bundled portable Ansible runtime to ansible-base 2.10.17, switches the managed runtime layout to the new portable-ansible directory, and aligns release packaging with the relocated bootstrap assets.

## [Add]

- Add doctor visibility for the bundled sshpass binary so operators can confirm the managed bootstrap asset is present before running env setup.

## [Change]

- Rebuild the bundled portable runtime with make_ansible_portable using ansible-base 2.10.17, no vault support, no PyYAML C extension, and a pinned ansible.posix 1.5.4 collection.
- Move the managed runtime path from portable-ansible-v0.5.0-py3 to portable-ansible and update dbbotctl, tests, validation commands, and user-facing documentation to match the new layout.
- Move the control-host bootstrap script and bundled sshpass binary to libexec/dbbotctl and document the new bootstrap flow for dbbotctl env setup.

## [Fix]

- Fix curated release packaging and package validation so the managed release asset always includes portable-ansible, libexec/dbbotctl/setup_portable_ansible.sh, and libexec/dbbotctl/sshpass-x64.
- Fix shell bootstrap alias updates so existing ansible and ansible-playbook entries in ~/.bashrc are rewritten to the new runtime path instead of leaving stale aliases behind.

## [Remove]

- Remove the legacy portable-ansible-v0.5.0-py3 runtime directory from the managed release layout.
